mapper.select: SELECT ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, COALESCE(qe.status, 'NO_INPUT') AS qualStatus FROM evaluation_period ep LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id AND qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 WHERE ep.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY CASE WHEN ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 0 WHEN ep.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ep.eval_year DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC, ep.eval_period_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.status, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) AND qe.status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY qe.evaluation_level ASC

SELECT qn.quantitative_evaluation_id AS quantitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qn.uph_score AS uphScore, qn.yield_score AS yieldScore, qn.lead_time_score AS leadTimeScore, qn.actual_error AS actualError, qn.s_quant AS sQuant, qn.t_score AS tScore, qn.material_shielding AS materialShielding, qn.status FROM quantitative_evaluation qn JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id WHERE qn.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND qn.eval_period_id = #{periodId} LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.input_method AS inputMethod, qe.status, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY qe.evaluation_level ASC

SELECT COALESCE(qe3.qualitative_evaluation_id, qe2.qualitative_evaluation_id) AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, COALESCE(qe3.grade, qe2.grade) AS grade, COALESCE(qe3.score, qe2.score) AS score, COALESCE(qe3.status, qe2.status) AS status, qe3.confirmed_at AS confirmedAt, qe1.score AS firstScore, qe2.score AS secondScore, qn.t_score AS quantScore, CASE WHEN ea.appeal_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS underReview, CASE WHEN ea.appeal_id IS NOT NULL THEN FALSE WHEN qe3.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND qe3.confirmed_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN TRUE WHEN qe2.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS appealable FROM qualitative_evaluation qe2 JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe3 ON qe3.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe3.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe3.evaluation_level = 3 LEFT JOIN quantitative_evaluation qn ON qn.employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qn.eval_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_appeal ea ON ea.appeal_employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND ea.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe2.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe2.status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY ep.eval_year DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe.status = 'SUBMITTED'

SELECT eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period WHERE status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, eval_year DESC, eval_sequence DESC, eval_period_id DESC LIMIT 1
